title: Noisy Sensors: Precision Buys Robustness

runtime.expected_outcome: With the precision_vector opt set, noisy observations produce softer posteriors; raising precision recovers sharp inference.

audiences.kid: If your eyes are blurry, you're less sure where you are. Sharper eyes means sharper answers.
audiences.real: Precision-weighting the observation model sets how much the agent trusts noisy sensors. Cookbook uses the new :precision_vector bundle option (G6).
audiences.equation: P(o|s) scales with exp(precision * log A). High precision -> sharp posterior; low precision -> soft posterior even on clean evidence.
audiences.derivation: Precision acts as an inverse-variance on the observation likelihood. In variational terms, it rescales the accuracy term of F (Feldman & Friston 2010).

orchestrate.objective: Show how the G6 :precision_vector option trades observation robustness for uncertainty in the posterior.
orchestrate.role: Precision tutor using the smallest maze for clarity.

credits: Parr, Pezzulo & Friston (2022), Active Inference, MIT Press (CC BY-NC-ND), Ch 5.
Feldman & Friston (2010), Attention, uncertainty, and free-energy.
